meaning: <日>n.[单复同]相扑场(指15场比赛的锦标赛,日本相扑比赛每年举行两次,分3月场和9月场)
examples: The influence of Chinese culture on Basho is clear and cannot be overlooked.
The concept of Fueki ryuko advocated by the Japanese poet Matso basho actually pursues a style of Haikai.
Haibun is the Japanese name for 17th Centurey poet-monk Basho Matsuo's poetic-prose travel journals which were studded with haiku.
Dave has something in common with CEOs from Basho, Opscode and Zenoss.
Basho hired former Accenture CTO Don Rippert in In June of last year.
